Beachfront and Free WiFi: TMS Quy Nhon - Hupasearest Apartment SeaView in Quy Nhon offers direct beachfront access and complimentary WiFi. Guests can relax on the terrace or balcony with stunning sea views.
Comfortable Amenities: The apartment features air-conditioning, a fully equipped kitchenette, and a private bathroom with free toiletries. Additional amenities include a washing machine, work desk, and parquet floors.
Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from a lift, full-day security, and car hire services. The property provides a dining area with outdoor furniture and a pool with a view.

Prime Beachfront Location: Sala Quy Nhon Beach Hotel in Quy Nhon offers direct beachfront access with Quy Nhon Beach just a 2-minute walk away. Guests can relax on the sun terrace or take a dip in the rooftop swimming pool.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with free toiletries, and sea or city views. Additional amenities include balconies, minibars, and soundproofing, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Dining Experience: The hotel serves a variety of cuisines at its restaurant, including British, French, and Vietnamese. Breakfast options include continental, American, and local specialities. A pool bar and coffee shop provide additional dining choices.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can enjoy a fitness centre, indoor play area, and kids' pool.
